# 📝 Markdown to Image Generator

> **A modern online tool that transforms your Markdown content into beautiful images instantly!**

## ✨ Project Overview

This is a Markdown-to-image conversion tool built with **React + Vite**, featuring real-time preview, multiple theme options, and customizable styling. Whether you're sharing content, posting on social media, or creating document screenshots, this tool has you covered!

---

## 🎨 Core Features

### 1️⃣ Text Styling

Supports standard and extended Markdown syntax:

- **Bold text**: Use `**text**` to emphasize
- *Italic text*: Use `*text*` for emphasis
- <u>Underlined text</u>: Use `<u>text</u>` HTML tag
- ~~Strikethrough text~~: Use `~~text~~` for deletions
- `Inline code`: Use backticks for code snippets

### 2️⃣ Heading Levels

Supports six heading levels for document structure:

# H1 Level One
## H2 Level Two
### H3 Level Three
#### H4 Level Four

### 3️⃣ List Support

**Unordered Lists:**

- 🎯 Real-time preview
- 🎨 8+ beautiful themes
- 📱 Multiple social media sizes
- 🖼️ High-quality image export
- 💾 One-click copy to clipboard

**Ordered Lists:**

1. Enter Markdown in the left editor
2. Adjust styles and themes in config panel
3. View real-time preview on the right
4. Download or copy the generated image

### 4️⃣ Blockquotes

> 💡 **Tip**: This tool runs entirely in your browser with no backend server required—your content stays completely private and secure!
> 
> Supports multi-line quotes, perfect for displaying important information, warnings, or citing others.

### 5️⃣ Table Support

Supports GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM) table syntax:

| Feature | Support | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| Headings | ✅ Full Support | H1-H6 all levels |
| Text Format | ✅ Full Support | Bold, italic, underline, strikethrough |
| Lists | ✅ Full Support | Ordered & unordered lists |
| Tables | ✅ Full Support | GFM standard tables |
| Code Highlight | ✅ Full Support | Multi-language syntax highlighting |
| Links & Images | ✅ Full Support | External & inline links |
| Theme Switch | ✅ Full Support | 8 preset themes |
| Custom Styles | ✅ Full Support | Colors, fonts, spacing customizable |

### 6️⃣ Code Highlighting

Supports syntax highlighting for multiple programming languages:

```javascript
// JavaScript Example
function generateImage(markdown, config) {
  const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  
  // Render Markdown content
  render(markdown, config);
  
  return canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
}

console.log('🎨 Starting image generation...');
```

```python
# Python Example
def process_markdown(content):
    """Process Markdown content"""
    lines = content.split('\n')
    result = []
    
    for line in lines:
        result.append(line.strip())
    
    return '\n'.join(result)
```

### 7️⃣ Link Support

Supports external links: [Visit GitHub](https://github.com) | [View Documentation](https://example.com)

---

## 🎯 Use Cases

1. **Social Media Sharing**: Create beautiful images for WeChat, Weibo, Xiaohongshu
2. **Tech Blogging**: Generate attractive cover images for articles
3. **Educational Materials**: Create course handouts and study notes
4. **Project Documentation**: Generate README preview images
5. **Design Showcase**: Quickly create text layout mockups

---

## 🔧 Tech Stack

- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 + Vite
- **Markdown Rendering**: react-markdown + remark-gfm
- **Code Highlighting**: react-syntax-highlighter
- **Image Generation**: html2canvas
- **Internationalization**: react-i18next

---

## 📦 Quick Start

1. Select themes and styles in the **Config Panel** (left)
2. Enter your Markdown content in the **Editor** (center)
3. View real-time effects in the **Preview** (right)
4. Click **Download** or **Copy** button to get your image

---

**💖 Enjoy creating!**
